evidence_summary: Transition the visual energy from violent kinetic chaos to a rhythmic, suspended state of eerie calm. Use light movement and house sway to establish the new status quo of high-altitude drifting.
The violent shaking subsides into a rhythmic swaying. Exhausted and overwhelmed, Dorothy and Toto fall asleep as the house continues its long, silent journey through the sky.
